summary: Full-stack testing of Commercion Exim marketing site. Backend (5/5 pytest tests passed) covering /api/health, POST/GET /api/leads (persistence, no _id leak, desc sort), and 422 validation. Frontend E2E validated hero, all sections, 10 product cards, WhatsApp float, EN/HI language toggle, and contact form submission returning 201 with email_notification_sent=true and success toast displayed.

issues: Section anchor id is not '#cert' — nav-cert link exists but section#cert not found. If smooth-scroll to certifications is expected, ensure the wrapper uses id='cert' to match the nav anchor. (Section still renders visually.)

action_items: Minor: align Certifications section id with nav-cert anchor (either use id='cert' on the section wrapper or change nav href to actual id) so smooth-scroll works from the Certifications nav item.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER send_lead_notification uses it (line 114) — works only because it's called after logging.basicConfig at module load, but the reference is late-bound. Move logger definition above helpers to avoid future NameError risk.
@app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan handler.
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is a known browser conflict; consider restricting origins for production.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all functional flows pass; one minor anchor mismatch)

seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_* leads via API and UI during testing; safe to leave.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://commerce-connect-189.preview.emergentagent.com. Resend email proxy is live (email_notification_sent=true observed). Contact form uses sonner toast (no redirect). Product testids product-card-<key> for all 10 verticals present. Certifications section renders but section id may not be 'cert'.
